description: ORB + CNN Paper Trading — Live signals, risk metrics, filter rates, model performance

panels.title: Filter Pass Rate (session)
panels.description: Ratio of breakouts that passed the majority filter gate. Target: 30–70% (too high = filters too loose; too low = too strict).
Distribution of CNN breakout probabilities across all evaluated signals. Ideal: bimodal — most mass below 0.5 (filtered) or above 0.82 (signals).
panels.title: CNN P(good breakout) — Rolling

panels.description: Fraction of CNN-evaluated signals that cleared the 0.82 threshold. Watch for drift: if this drops below 20% consistently, the model may need retraining.
panels.title: CNN Signal Rate (>0.82)

panels.description: Average CNN inference latency. Target: <50ms on GPU. Values above 200ms indicate CPU fallback or model loading overhead.
panels.title: CNN Inference Latency

panels.description: CNN probabilities bucketed into confidence bands. Healthy: most signals cluster in high (>0.85) or low (<0.5) — very few in the 0.5–0.82 ambiguous zone.
panels.title: CNN Confidence Bands (session)

panels.description: Breakdown of why breakouts were filtered or blocked. High 'filter_failed' means the majority gate is working correctly. High 'cnn_gated' means CNN gate is active (only when ORB_CNN_GATE=1).
panels.title: Filter Disposition (published vs filtered vs CNN-gated)

panels.description: Number of open positions tracked by the data service.
panels.title: Open Positions

panels.description: Risk event breakdown. Blocks mean the RiskManager rejected a trade attempt. Warnings are advisory.
panels.title: Risk Check Results

panels.description: Current best model validation accuracy. Red below 80%, yellow 80–82%, green above 82%.
panels.title: Model Val Accuracy

panels.description: Precision of the current best model (true positives / (true positives + false positives)). Target: >88%.
panels.title: Model Precision

panels.description: Recall of the current best model (true positives / all actual positives). Target: >70%.
panels.title: Model Recall

panels.description: Total training samples in the current dataset. Target: 10,000+ for reliable generalization.
panels.title: Dataset Size

panels.description: Time since the last successful overnight retrain. Red if more than 48h — model may be stale.
panels.title: Time Since Last Retrain

panels.description: Current CNN inference threshold. Breakouts below this score are advisory only (or blocked if CNN gate is on). Default: 0.82.
panels.title: CNN Threshold

panels.description: Validation accuracy across retrain runs. Watch for improvement trend. Each point is a completed retrain epoch. A healthy model should hold or improve over time.
panels.title: Model Metrics Over Time (retrain history)

panels.description: How often each individual filter rejects a breakout. High rejection rate on a single filter may indicate misconfiguration or an edge-case instrument behavior.
panels.title: ORB Filter Outcomes (passed / rejected / error / no-trade)

panels.description: Rejection rate per symbol. If one symbol is consistently filtered out (>80%), consider removing it from the focus list for this week.
panels.title: Focus Quality by Symbol (proxy for filter rejection risk)

panels.description: Focus quality score per asset symbol. Higher is better. Drives ORB priority — only assets above threshold are checked for breakouts.
panels.title: Focus Quality Score by Asset

title: ORB CNN Paper Trading
